hero.title: A sharper jawline,
hero.desc: Subtle definition or a stronger angle, we tailor it to your face, not a trend. Doctor-led planning, authentic products, and a result that still looks like you.

why.title: Why jawline definition matters
why.desc: A well-defined jawline does not just "look sharp." It balances the entire lower face, creating harmony and confidence.
why.quote: "In Kuala Lumpur, we see one common pattern. People do not want a dramatic change. They want a cleaner line from ear to chin, a more confident side profile, and a face that looks less tired."

what.title: What is
what.desc1: Jawline filler is a non-surgical injectable treatment that adds structure along the jaw, usually using hyaluronic acid (HA) dermal fillers. HA is widely used in dermal fillers and is gradually absorbed by the body over time.
what.desc2: Think of it like subtle sculpting. Small amounts are placed along specific points to create a smoother jawline, support the jaw angle, and reduce the look of sagging around the lower face.
what.approachDesc: The focus is facial harmony. We plan your jawline with your chin, cheeks, and natural face shape in mind, not a one-size template.

canHelp.title: What jawline filler can help with
canHelp.cannot2: Heavy lower face from muscle bulk
canHelp.cannot3: Double chin caused mainly by fat
canHelp.note: The best results often come from choosing the correct tool, or combining treatments in a staged plan.

areas.title: Areas we treat for
areas.desc: Jawline contouring is not one injection point. It is a "map."
areas.note: This is why online pricing "per treatment" can be misleading. Jawline shaping often needs more product than smaller areas like lips.

fillers.title: What fillers are typically used?
fillers.filler1Desc: Specifically designed for jawline definition with high G' prime for lift and structure.
fillers.filler2Desc: Ideal for jaw body and pre-jowl areas with balanced lift and natural movement.
fillers.note: HA fillers can differ in how they are formulated and crosslinked, which affects properties like firmness and longevity. That is one reason product choice matters as much as technique.

process.title: What to expect at
process.step1Desc: Facial assessment at rest and in motion
process.step2Desc: Plan key jawline points and volume

pain.title: Does jawline filler hurt?
pain.desc: Most people describe it as pressure or brief pinches. Many fillers include lidocaine, and numbing can be used to improve comfort.
pain.healing1: Mild swelling for a few days

aftercare.title: Aftercare that protects your result
aftercare.desc: Good aftercare reduces swelling and helps your jawline settle smoothly.
aftercare.item4: Do not press or massage the jawline
aftercare.item5: Sleep slightly elevated the first night
aftercare.item6: Contact clinic if anything feels unusual
aftercare.source: Source: American Society of Plastic Surgeons

longevity.title: How long does
longevity.dur3Desc: possible depending on product and metabolism
longevity.syringeDesc: Jawline usually needs more product because it is a longer area focused on structure.

cost.title: Jawline filler cost in Kuala Lumpur
cost.note: Because jawline often needs multiple syringes, total budget depends on your plan. Consultation lets us estimate the likely range.

compare.title: Jawline filler vs other treatments
compare.comp1Other: Slims jaw if muscle is bulky
compare.note: Some faces need lift first, others need shape first. We decide based on your anatomy.

safety.title: Side effects and safety
safety.rareDesc: Infection, allergic reactions, vascular occlusion. This is why jawline filler should be done by trained medical professionals.
safety.emergency: If you ever experience severe pain, skin whitening, spreading discoloration, or vision symptoms after any filler treatment, seek urgent medical care.

faq.q1: How long does jawline filler last?
faq.a1: Most people see results for 6 to 12 months, and sometimes longer depending on the product and your metabolism.
faq.a2: Yes, if the plan matches your face and the volume is appropriate. Natural results are about balance, not maximum sharpness.
faq.a3: When done by trained medical professionals using authentic products, it is generally safe. Like any medical procedure, risks exist.
faq.a4: If it is hyaluronic acid filler, it can often be dissolved using hyaluronidase.

location.address: LG 10, Lower Ground Floor, Wisma UOA II, Jalan Pinang, 50450 Kuala Lumpur
